expected_properties: wave reaches 31 and then decrements on subsequent cycles
wave reaches 0 and then increments on subsequent cycles
additional_cases.goal: Validate that the waveform generator correctly changes direction at the boundaries 0 and 31.
stimulus_intent: Run the design without reset for enough clock cycles to observe a full up‑down traversal of the wave output.
timing_assumptions: Assume continuous clocking; do not rely on a fixed number of cycles for the boundary transitions.

expected_properties: Externally visible outputs remain defined and can change across conservative clocked observation windows.
The waveform progresses through increment and decrement phases without assuming a fixed-cycle protocol.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Observe clock-driven state progress after reset, capturing both incrementing and decrementing behavior of the wave output.
notes: Enriches the basic sanity check with explicit direction‑change observation.
stimulus_intent: Release reset if present and observe a sufficient number of clock edges to capture at least one full up‑down cycle of the wave output.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations; do not assume exact latency for direction changes.
